---
title: "Yu-You Liou"
about:
    template: trestles
    image: pic.png
    links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/yyliou
    - text: "{{< fa envelope >}} Email"
      href: mailto:d10627008@ntu.edu.tw
    - text: "<i class='bi bi-mortarboard-fill'></i> Google Sholar"
      url: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=PXyiL0oAAAAJ&hl=zh-TW
---

I am Yu-You Liou, a PhD candidate in Agricultural Economics at National Taiwan University (since 2023) and an adjunct lecturer at Shih Chien University (since 2024), where I teach undergraduate statistics, data analysis, and applied programming. My research focuses on (1) agricultural, environmental, and ecological economics, and (2) urban, regional, and transportation economics.

[My CV](https://yyliou.github.io/yyliou/yyliou-cv/yyliou-cv.pdf).

## Education

- **PhD Candidate** in Agricultural Economics, National Taiwan University (2023–)
- **MS** in Statistics, National Taiwan University (2020–2021)
- **MS** in Agricultural Economics, National Taiwan University (2019–2021)
- **BA** in Political Science, National Taiwan University (2016–2019)
- **BS** in Agricultural Economics, National Taiwan University (2015–2019)

## Position

- **Lecturer**, English Taught Program in International Business, Shih Chien University (2023–)
- **Research & Teaching Assistant**, Department of Agricultural Economics, National Taiwan University (2019–)

## Awards & Grants

- NSTC Graduate Research Fellowship, National Science and Technology Council, 2022–2026.
- Teach Grant, Shih Chien University, 2025–2026.
- Research Grant, CMC Magnetics Co., Ltd. (2323), 2025.

## Acknowledgement

I am profoundly grateful to Professor [Hung-Hao Chang](https://sites.google.com/view/hh-chang) for his academic guidance and personal support throughout my master's and doctoral journey. His mentorship has left a lasting impact for which I will always be thankful.
